reviews.title: Old Hotel, staffs  are not friendly
reviews.text: Mình thuê hai phòng nhưng một phòng hỏng vòi hoa sen ko dùng được, một phòng mùi ẩm mốc. Chăn ga bị mốc. Gọi nhân viên lên thay chăn và ga giường thì thái độ không chấp nhận được. Khách sạn nằm gần cảng nên mùi rất tanh.  Phòng tắm thì hỏng quạt thông gió. Cừa phòng tắm thì ko thể đóng được một cách nhẹ nhàng cứ phải kéo mạnh thì mới đóng được.  Nói chung là sẽ không bao giờ có lần hai.  Các bạn nên chọn khách sạn khác nhé.

reviews.title: stay was decent just wish they’d add vents to the bathroom so black mold wouldn’t form.
reviews.positives: property was big and nice, beds were comfortable area was quiet and the shower had strong water flow.
reviews.negatives: once you step in you’re hit with a mildew scent which goes away once you turn on the ac. the bathroom door was covered with black mold that was wiped off. the shower had a door but the water seeps out from the bottom so you have to be careful when you step out

reviews.title: Old hotel and staff is not friendly
reviews.text: Phòng mùi ẩm mốc rất khó chịu,  chăn ga bị mốc. Gọi nhân viên lên thay ga giường thì nhân viên dọn phòng thái độ ko tốt.  vị trí khách sạn nằm ngay gần cảng nên mùi rất tanh . Một trải nghiệm rất tệ. Không bao giờ dám quay lại nữa

reviews.title: Great
reviews.positives: Location is close to a lot of good local restaurants
reviews.negatives: the lightings in the hallway were automatically on and off so it gave us the feeling there was nobody there except us since the hallway was always dark when we opened our room doors

reviews.title: We changed for another hotel
reviews.text: Old hotel, completely filled with little ant. Worse breakfast I ever saw in Vietnam. I couldn’t eat. We only stayed one night although we paid for two.

reviews.title: Good Facilities, Nice Location Amazing people
reviews.positives:
We had a very pleasant stay at Riverside Hotel during our visit to Dong Hoi. The highlight of our stay was the beautiful room on the 9th floor, offering a lovely view from the window. The room was spacious and came with adequate amenities, making our stay comfortable.

What truly stood out was the exceptional service provided by two of your staff members. The names are Thanh and  Oanh.
They were efficient, polite, and always ready to help with a cheerful attitude. 
When our luggage was misplaced by Vietjet Airlines, we were left without our belongings. During this stressful time, Mr Thanh took initiative to   follow up with the airline to get the status of our lost baggage. He aso   helped us navigate local markets and transportation. Their support brought us much-needed peace of mind, and we’re truly grateful
reviews.negatives:
However, there were a few areas that could be improved. We faced issues with the hot water supply and poor water pressure in the shower, which made bathing inconvenient. The shower unit itself was not functioning properly. Additionally, the room lacked a microwave, and the linen provided was not as clean as expected. Another point to consider is the location of the property—it is not very convenient for access to daily essentials like groceries, fruits, or medicines.

Suggestions for Improvement:

Ensure a consistent supply of hot water with good pressure.

Upgrade or repair the shower units to ensure proper functionality.

Provide a microwave in the room for guest convenience.

Improve the cleanliness and quality of linens.

Consider adding a small convenience store or shuttle service for access to nearby shops.


Despite these issues, we enjoyed our stay and appreciated the hospitality. With a few improvements, Riverside Hotel can offer an even better experience to its guests.

reviews.text: Musty and dirty. Mould on walls and sheets. Not vacuumed, hair and dirt under bed

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: ocean view, cleanliness

reviews.title: quite noisy
reviews.text: The hotel itself is nice and clean. I stayed 2 nights (one is deluxe room 5th floor and one is riverside 9th floor) Both rooms are quite small, and they put too many furniture which is useless. The main issue I found is noisy, rooms are not soundproof. Staffs are so so, I cannot say they are friendly or helpful.

reviews.title: Short stay in a conveniently located hotel to visit Paradise Cave.
reviews.positives: Our room had a great view near the beach and river. Breakfast the first morning was great.
reviews.negatives: Hotel felt somewhat deserted - v. few people staying.  Room was a bit musty. Was difficult to get the right temperature in the shower.

reviews.title: Sterile but clean
reviews.text: You feel like you are the only one there.  Lights int he common areas only turn on when you enter. The breakfast was fine one morning, then the next, perhaps because there was not one in the hotel, was sparse. You can make it work in Dong Hoi- check out the caves, the local seafood restaurant next to the two Karaoke bars (no clue about them), and the Korean BBQ next to the Gemini cafe/hotel- they cook right in front of you so you see just what you are eating. I enjoyed myself despite the sterile hotel.

reviews.title: Fantastic
reviews.positives: Fantastic hotel. Everything about it was great.

reviews.title: Moldy room
reviews.text: The hotel looks nice from the outside, but the room is damp and moldy. The security staff are difficult and just stand there watching guests carry their luggage. There are no ramps for pulling luggage, so you have to carry it up the high steps.

reviews.title: Good Room and Location
reviews.positives: Great location and very peaceful.
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: Would stay again
reviews.text: Biggest problem i had was the powerpoints couldn't charge and hold my laptop. I am a remote worker and needed it for work. Internet is good, room size great, nice view.

reviews.title: Buen gusto
reviews.positives: Todo. Las personas fueron super amables, la cama, el hotel es hermoso, una decoración divina, en una zona tranquila con una vista hermosa. La habitación con mucho espacio y lo mejor es la cama. Y todas las personas siempre dispuestas a ayudar.
reviews.negatives: Lo único fue que el restaurante no estaba funcionando cuando fuimos.

reviews.title: its ok hotel
reviews.text: good location and view.

reviews.title: Ne recommande pas.
reviews.positives:
La literie est très confortable. La chambre que nous avions était spacieuse. 
La vue au 9eme étage est super.
reviews.negatives:
Nous avons été déçus par notre séjour dans cet hôtel. Malheureusement, certaines personnes fument à l’intérieur, et à cause de la ventilation des climatiseurs, l’odeur remonte jusque dans les chambres, ce qui est très désagréable.

Le personnel est moyennement sympathique, ne parle pas bien anglais et ne donne aucun conseil sur les restaurants, lieux à visiter ou activités à faire aux alentours — ce qui est dommage pour un hôtel de ce standing.

Le soir, nous avons eu la mauvaise surprise de croiser un énorme cafard… au 9e étage ! Cela nous a vraiment dérangés, et on se demande comment il a pu arriver là.

Les installations de la salle de bain sont également à revoir : la douche est mal conçue, et la pression d’eau est très irrégulière.

Certes, le mobilier est impressionnant et de style très rococo, mais malheureusement, cela ne reflète pas la qualité réelle du service ou du confort attendu.

Désolés, mais nous ne recommanderions pas cet hôtel.

reviews.title: Not good
reviews.text: Stayed Riverside 2 nights ,used it as a base to visit caves , on entering this hotel it looks superb ,very nicely decorated ,hotel is very new only abt 1 year old , room is very nice , again very high standard of decoration , location great right on the river , staff tried hard but in general English was very poor but I think maybe they are more used to guests from Vietnam , so now the bads , they ALLOW smoking in the breakfast room , this to me is a massive mistake , virtually all hotels now are aware that smoking should not be allowed in public eating areas , in the room have kettle and tea but NO coffee supplied , the air con units are the built in type ,u cannot adjust the direction of the air which makes them pretty useless ,no bar in the hotel ,the towel rail was fitted directly above the toilet , I hit my head on this rail at least 4 times ,sooo annoying ,no gym and no pool ....... I wouldn't stay here again ..

reviews.text: The bed cleanliness is okay. However, the guest towels are not clean, they are very black. The price is around 500K/night without breakfast for a room for 2 people, which is fine. The only issue is that the towels look black, so it feels unclean.

reviews.text:
Phòng nằm ngay vị trí siêu đẹp, nhưng hệ thống khách sạn khiến m hơi thất vọng. 
ổ điện không vào điện, và đặc biệt là phòng không cách âm là biết sẽ ồn ào nhưng phòng kế bên trẻ em và ng lớn nói chuyện quá ồn, 1h sáng chạy nhảy trêu đùa rồi đóng - mở cửa ầm ầm la hét rất ồn. 
Nếu đi theo đoàn du lịch thì ok còn đi nghỉ ngơi, công tác thì nên cân nhắc!

reviews.title: Breakfast buffet was not good.
reviews.text: It seems newly built because facilities are quite good. The hotel also has good location. However, we were disappointed with a couple of things. The lobby was hot (not air-conditioned) whenever we were there. Breakfast buffet was provided with many options but not good quality. It's said service time for breakfast from 6 to 9. But at 8 there is no more (soya) milk, juice and even water. I asked the staff to refill but they ignored until we left (around 9). One more thing, coffee is terrible.

reviews.title: Vies, geen ontbijt, voelden ons niet welkom

reviews.negatives: De rest van de kamer was niet schoon, er lag een afgebroken nep nagel op de grond, schimmel op de muren, kakkerlak op de grond, doucheputje liep niet door waardoor de hele kamer blank stond en er lag nog overal stof, haren en vlekken. Personeel gaf geen informatie en ontbijt bleek ook te missen.

Nhân viên lễ tân nhiệt tình nhg mình mượn 1 cái đĩa, 1 con dao hơn 1 tiếng đồng hồ không thấy mang đến phòng.

Tối còn có tiếng gì ồn nữa. Máy lạnh mình chỉnh nhiệt độ cao nhất nhưng vẫn thấy lạnh, ko biết có hoạt động theo bảng điều khiển ko nữa.

reviews.title: visiting Dong Hoi?
reviews.text:
The Riverside Hotel, Dong Hoi is a relatively new hotel built in French Colonial Style, which seems a little out of place with its surroundings, but it is very clean, spacious and the staff extremely helpful and attentive.
We only stayed one night in Dong Hoi and found the hotel central enough for us to walk most places for a look around this part of the city. The beach nearby is not very inviting and at the time of our visit (Late October) was quite deserted.
The Riverside Hotel is good value for money. My only disappointment was the breakfast.. We had to leave early to catch a train to Da Nang and went to the breakfast buffet at 6:15 (It opens at 6:00) and found that the food was still being setup and not all ready. The coffee was also not good; unusual in Vietnam.

reviews.title: Hài lòng và rất đáng đồng tiền bát gạo
reviews.positives: Vị trí tiện lợi, gần bãi nhật lệ và nhiều quán ăn. Chỗ đỗ xe ở ngay dưới hoặc ở đối diện đường. View từ cửa sổ phòng nhìn ra như đang ở bến cảng Ý. Nói chung rất hài lòng và sẽ giới thiệu cho bạn bè

reviews.title: Ideal for a short stop over
reviews.text: We travel by train approx 4 hours per day. The Hotel is perfect for a short stop over. The rooms are clean, the breakfast contains European and Asian selections, the room is equipped with fresh fruit, the staff is friendly and speaks some English. The hotel is a bit old and you can hear the noises of your neighbors and the air vents at night very well.

reviews.title: Beautiful hotel but a bit lacking in customer service

reviews.title: Solid hotel
reviews.text: The hotel was quite nice. Comfortable beds, good views of the river and ocean, and the onsite restaurant was tasty. The hotel was a short 5 minute walk along the river to several other restaurants and cafes as well. The customer service staff were not responsive in advance of our arrival--I tried to arrange an airport transfer and some flowers 2 days in advance to no avail--but there were extenuating circumstances (family emergency for the responsible staff person, who sent a nice apology email after the fact), so I'd imagine they're usually good in that department. I'd definitely stay there again!

With a variety of cafe's/bars close by , or grab a cab for a meal over near the beach .After a train ride from danang and an overnight stay before heading off to phong nha , this hotel was a good choice.The local bus passes out the front of the hotel on the hour for transfers

reviews.title: Tuyệt vời lắm
reviews.positives:
Mình đã 3 năm liền đi Quảng Bình và 3 năm vẫn lựa chọn Riverside. Trong các chuyến công tác khác mình đã ở các ks hay resort khác nhưng vẫn ưa thích nơi này cho kì nghỉ gia đình nhất, nhân viên rất nice, rất gần các quán ăn, đối diện chiều tối là các quán ăn nhỏ nên tối không hề bị nhàm chán.
Phòng luôn được dọn sạch sẽ, nhân viên chu đáo và hỗ trợ khách cực tốt

reviews.title: Its worth your wallet
reviews.text:
This must be a new hotel. It is located by the river so its quite easy to get to other places in the center. The building looks like a French castle amongs others, so nice. The staffs are friendly and helpful when I took a shower and half of the room flooded. They helped me without any discommodity. The water in the bathroom runs too slow which made the room was full of water.  Its must be the only minus point I think. 
In general, its still worth your money.

reviews.title: Rất hợp túi tiền, tiện nghi đủ dùng
reviews.positives: Phòng Deluxe view toàn cảnh nhìn ra sông rất đẹp, phòng rất thoáng, tiện nghi thoải mái, phòng sạch và nội thất còn mới. Giường và gối êm, phù hợp với mọi lứa tuổi.
reviews.negatives: Bố trí nhà tắm hơi nhỏ, cảm giác bí bách. Đồ ăn sáng buffet chưa được đa dạng món ăn lắm: có trà, cf tự phục vụ, một vài loại hoa quả như đu đủ, dưa hấu. Có cơm chiên, bánh bao, và chỉ một số loại đồ ăn Á.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The hotel is clean and beautiful, and the staff are enthusiastic; the only downside is that the beach is a bit far away, requiring an electric car to get there. Other than that, it's very convenient for going out or dining.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Čudovit hotel z pogledom na reko in mesto.V bližini vseh zanimivosti.Osebje zelo ustrežljivo in prijazno.Zajtrk samopostrežen in okusen.Priporočam.
reviews.negatives: Brez pripomb

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Good location, just few minutes from station by taxi. The room overviewing the beach from window is clean and quiet. We enjoyed staying here.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: Det var rent og prisen var god
reviews.negatives: Restauranten var lukket fordi det var lavsæson så billeder af buffet er misvisende. Personalet forstår meget lidt engelsk så det var vanskeligt at kommunikere.

reviews.title: Excellent hotel in new tourist area
reviews.text:
The hotel is beautiful and clean with excellent service. It is one of the highest standard hotels we stayed in for this price level. The hotel is very close to cafes and restaurants catering to Asian and Western tastes in a budding new tourist area. The staff was helpful in arranging tours for us and transportation to Hue. Travel to Phong Nha is easy.

The one con of the hotel is the restaurant. The breakfast caters more to Asian guests than western. The dinner is good but the atmosphere of the restaurant is too quiet. We were the only guests there for dinner. It's a shame because the food is excellent. I think they should do better marketing for the restaurant in the guest rooms and maybe in the lobby and lift as well. I think most guests forget it is there

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: The location is great. And built like Buckingham palace
reviews.negatives: The staff must be the rudest in Vietnam which is surprising because everybody else in Dong Hoi was so incredibly welcoming and polite. Oh yes, kettle and cups in the room but no coffee or spoons provided. And for the price you pay, I thought this was disgusting.

reviews.title: Super Plush for the money
reviews.text: This is an extremely nice hotel with beautiful, plush, comfy rooms and beds. This room would cost hundreds in the USA. The breakfast is a little funky but we made due with the spread they had. Everyone was very friendly and helpful. The hotel is a little further down then the rest but not too far of a walk to get to some good restaurants. I’d stay here again for the price.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives:
Stunning views of the river and a very grand reception make this hotel appealing but unfortunately the grandeur is only surface deep. We were surprised on arrival that nobody was around to help us up the steps with our luggage (in the rain) but the huge and impressive reception area was staffed by one young man behind 
a desk. Our room was large with a view of the river but seemed a bit grubby with marks/dead moths on the wallpaper and mould spots in the bathroom.
reviews.negatives: We decided to stay in the hotel for a drink and an evening meal as we had spent the day travelling and it was raining. Unfortunately, the restaurant was closed for either refurbishment or because it was not peak season. This was annoying, as it was advertised as offering breakfast too and although we hadn't requested this in advance we were hoping to use this facility. The area around the hotel is not great for bars and restaurants unless you want seafood!

reviews.title: Nice hotel
reviews.text: The hotel is near the center area and you can find some local food around very convenient. The staff are very helpful.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: Very clean and nice and incredible value
reviews.negatives: I arrived early on the train and was virtually treated rather averagely until I checked in after a tour

reviews.title: Great accommodation on river bank.
reviews.text: Shame there is no swimming pool.  But great hotel.

reviews.title: Nice hotel just didn’t feel homely.
reviews.positives: This is a nice hotel . But has not got a good feel for. It seem to be under staffed. Only one person on front desk. After all the hotels I have stayed at in Vietnam this one just didn’t do it for me. I will say the view from our room was amazing. 8 floor sea view.
reviews.negatives: Towel rail in bathroom hit my head on it twice. But I am 6ft4” so most people wouldn’t have a problem. The hot water was not that hot.

reviews.title: Satisfied
reviews.text: The hotel has a convenient location for traveling, and the room windows offer a view of the sea across from Le Thuy Bridge. The reception is friendly and enthusiastic. I will come back again next time.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.negatives: Rooms smell of smoke

reviews.title: Exceptional

reviews.title: It's okay but doesn't serve food
reviews.positives: Room was good: well-decorated, spacious, and clean.
reviews.negatives:
No restaurant- hence no breakfast.
Staff had poor language skills.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text:
My family would like to express our sincere thanks to the hotel owner, staff, and security for their incredibly enthusiastic and thoughtful support when our car unfortunately broke down during the New Year holiday. In a rather confusing time when repair shops were closed for the holiday, my family received quick, dedicated, and responsible help from the hotel. 
Your professionalism and willingness to assist customers have made us feel much more at ease and provided us with warm experiences in our trip at the beginning of the year. We wish the hotel continued growth and hope to have the chance to return soon!

reviews.title: Un bon standing pour un prix modéré : un hôtel en devenir
reviews.text: L'hôtel est neuf, les chambres sont grandes. Le mobilier peut sembler clinquant ou dans la demeusure pour certains mais au final on a l'impression d'être dans un hôtel de luxe pour pas très cher. Le buffet du petit déjeuner est très copieux. Il manque tout de même un coffre dans la chambre et le personnel a la réception parle un anglais très aproximatif. La carte de la ville est payante a la réception.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: Nice place

reviews.title: Khách sạn quá tệ
reviews.text: Tôi đặt loại phòng dành cho 2 người lớn + 1 trẻ em từ 0 ->11 tuổi được miễn phí, vậy mà khi đặt phòng tôi chỉ khai báo có 2 người lớn do tôi thấy phòng này miễn phí trẻ em dưới 11 tuổi nên tôi không khai báo, vậy là khách sạn phụ thu tôi 150.000 trẻ em 10 tuổi với lý do tôi không khai báo, phụ thu 150.000 mà không có ăn sáng , cũng không kê thêm giường phụ , vậy 150.000 đ này dùng để tắm thôi à ? Tôi thắc mắc tại sao đăng trên agoda đăng được miễn phí trẻ dưới 11 tuổi mà khách sạn lại thu tiền , thì lễ tân bảo "đăng vậy thôi, chứ không phải vậy " , tôi đứng hình với kiểu treo đầu dê bán thịt chó. Đã vậy khi tôi đến hay rời đi, không một ai ở khách sạn ra chào hay xách phụ hành lý, phòng ở thì cửa nhà tắm bị nổi mốc đen xì,  khi trả phòng lại quên trả căn cước làm tôi đi xa rồi lại phải quay lại lấy, quá tệ. Khách sạn này tự phong 4 * thôi, chứ 4* mà dịch vụ quá tệ. Mọi người đừng đặt phòng tại đây.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: bình thường

reviews.title: Ks gần trung tâm, tiện di chuyển nhưng phòng nhỏ, không có hồ bơi
reviews.text: Khách sạn khá gần trung tâm nhưng phòng nhỏ và không có hồ bơi và không kèm cả ăn sáng. So với mức giá này mình có thể đặt khách sạn mới hơn gần biển, có ăn sáng và hồ bơi. Thêm nữa là mình check in lúc 14h nhưng phòng vẫn chưa được dọn dẹp xong nhưng nhân viên đã chuyển cho mình sang phòng khác.

reviews.title: Quite happy
reviews.text:
Phòng ốc ok nhưng nước nhà vệ sinh hơi yếu.
Không gần bãi tắm, đi bộ khá xa, cũng không gần các quán ăn, nhà hàng.

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: Khách sạn hơi cũ, mình vào thì phòng có mùi ẩm, chăn dra cũng có mùi, cửa wc bị mốc nhẹ, rcm ks nên để tinh dầu trong phòng để khử mùi.

reviews.title: Du lịch hè 2024
reviews.text: Một nơi gia đình đi du lịch nghỉ đêm tại Đồng Hới nên ghé qua.

reviews.title: Đang làm đường
reviews.text:
Đang làm đường nên hơi bất tiện, và bụi bặm. Nhưng khi đường hoàn thành thì chắc sẽ ok hơn.
Hơi xa trung tâm. Phòng nhỏ nhắn sạch sẽ. Tối tự dưng vòi sen chảy nước, một lúc thì hết. 5h sáng mất điện, Ks có chạy máy phát điện nhưng ko bật được điều hoà.

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: Vị trí đẹp nhưng ks cũ nên hơi mùi, chăn gối hôi, không thơm

reviews.title: KHÁCH SẠN KHÔNG CHUYÊN NGHIỆP
reviews.text:
Khách sạn có ngoại hình bề thế, tổng quan khá đẹp và vị trí đẹp nhưng phong cách làm việc rất chậm chạp và không chuyên nghiệp.
Đồ ăn sáng rất ít món và không mang đến chút gì hương vị Quảng bình mà toàn đồ ăn sẵn chế biến nhanh.
Nhân viên lễ tân cau có và lạnh nhạt với khách. Xử lý tình huống phát sinh trong giao tiếp với khách cứ như là chẻ tre, nhăn nhó và bắt bẻ hơn cả dù khách hàng rất nhẹ nhàng.
Nói chung là để ngủ qua đêm thì đc nhưng để có 1 kì nghỉ tại đây thì hãy lựa chọn những khách sạn khác!

reviews.title: Ăn sáng rất tệ
reviews.text:
Tôi chưa bao giờ ở khách sạn 4 sao nào mà đồ ăn sáng ít và dở như vậy! từ món khô đến món nước đều quá tệ. Ít món và dở.
Vị trí đối diện chỗ neo tàu nên không thể tắm biển, muốn tắm phải đi cách đó vài km.
Nói chung ngoài nội thất sang trọng hoành tráng thì khách sạn không có gì nổi trội.

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: Ko có bể bơi . Quảng cáo 4 sao nhưng là 3 sao . Buffe báo trên hệ thông 125k . Đến nơi lê tân báo 200. Mọi thứ ko như quảng cáo

reviews.title: NÊN THAY CHĂN GỐI NHA KHÁCH SẠN ƠI
reviews.text: Chăn gối cũ và đã đổi màu. Chăn mốc đen nhiều chỗ chắc giặt tẩy hoài cũng không đi hay sao đó. Gối rách, sờn chỉ. Nước tắm không đều, lúc chảy mạnh lúc chảy yếu nên nước nóng ra không đều, tắm bị lúc thì bỏng rát da lúc thì lạnh sởn da gà, lặp đi lặp lại suốt quá trình tắm rửa thật kinh khủng. Ngoài vị trí đẹp và tổng quan nhìn khá đẹp thì trải nghiệm tắm rửa ngủ nghỉ khá tệ.

reviews.text: Khách sạn rộng, đẹp, sát sông Nhật Lệ, thuận tiện đến thăm tượng đài mẹ Suốt, cổng Bình Quan. Tuy nhiên không có nhân viên xách đồ cho khách dù là khách sạn 4 sao,  dồ ăn sáng không ngon, không phong phú. Giá tiền thì tương đối phù hợp.
